ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of carefully using a wrench.  The robot will mimic the precision and controlled movements needed for such a task. Frame 1 will show both arms at the sides in a neutral position. In Frame 2, the right arm will move forward, with the wrist slightly angled, as if holding the wrench. Frame 3 will show the right arm turning the wrench, with a slight adjustment in joint angles to simulate the twisting motion. Frame 4 will show the right arm returning to a more neutral position, but still holding the wrench. Frame 5 will show both arms returning to their neutral resting position.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready
right arm extends forward, holding the tool
turning the wrench with controlled effort
right arm holds steady, wrench in place
